title: Funimation Anime Expo Panel at 5 PM
display_title: Funimation Anime Expo Panel at 5 PM
wikitext:
[]: Funimation Anime Expo Panel at 5 PM...             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 03, 2015 12:38 pm http://www.ustream.tv/channel/animecon-industry If there's no Eva 3.33 announced, we riot.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Jul 03, 2015 12:46 pm Wish I could go. I'm attending a different panel; but rest assured, something that big will be filmed. It's in West Hall, and they always film the stuff in there. Actually, now that I check, if they don't clear the room between panels, I could probably make it in and report back. Even if I don't, though, since it's in West Hall, it might even be streamed. I don't actually know about that for sure, but it'll be worth checking.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jul 03, 2015 12:49 pm Funimation in about 5 hours: "We're working on it, it'll be out soon." "Soon" being 2017. ALSO: Somebody needs to ask them if they're picking up the rights to the BluRay releases.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 03, 2015 2:25 pm I have my broom ready if all goes wrong today. I can't see them not talking about it, but I couldn't see them not talking about it last Expo so.....

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jul 03, 2015 2:30 pm They'll probably just say: "It's coming! We're sorry for the delay, but it's coming!"

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jul 03, 2015 6:41 pm I'm fully expecting something like "Please check our faq for up to date information! http://www.funimation.com/forum/faq.php?faq=faq_fun_general_1#faq_faq_funshows_13 "

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Fri Jul 03, 2015 7:16 pm So I think they just said nothing about it at all.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Jul 03, 2015 7:25 pm I'm really starting to think that they are having a licensing dispute or the rights to Eva are in the process of switching hands.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 03, 2015 7:53 pm I dunno, I'm starting to agree the problem could be Khara's end (as much as it sucks to admit that) than Funi proper.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 03, 2015 8:02 pm If the problem is with Khara, I wonder what it could be that’s preventing them from letting Funi release the film. Is it the whole “we’re working closely with the director” mandate when Anno is busy with a Godzilla movie that’s slated to come out next year?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 03, 2015 8:16 pm Pfft there was almost nothing of interest from Funi let alone 3.0. Think about this, we got Legend of the Galactic Heroes from Sentai, Gundam 079/Z/ZZ/V/X from RightStuff, but we can't even get a release of 3.0!? Well, lets see what happens at that Bang Zoom thing, but I'm not going to expect anything. I really hope SOMEBODY gets the TV Blu-Rays.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jul 03, 2015 8:41 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: If the problem is with Khara, I wonder what it could be that’s preventing them from letting Funi release the film. Is it the whole “we’re working closely with the director” mandate when Anno is busy with a Godzilla movie that’s slated to come out next year?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 03, 2015 9:13 pm Well, if we hear nothing at the Eva Panel on Sunday, then(?) we can panic. ....Shit, too bad I couldn't go along with my original plan way back when of "SSD buys the Japanese NTE BDs only" (RL--including lack of disposable income--got in the way).

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 03, 2015 9:30 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Well, if we hear nothing at the Eva Panel on Sunday, then(?) we can panic.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jul 03, 2015 9:42 pm It really has come to a race between 3.0 and the Final trailer. Too much longer and we might see Final first

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jul 04, 2015 4:56 am They didn't even mention Evangelion. (Source: I was there.) We've got nothing, folks.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sat Jul 04, 2015 6:17 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: They didn't even mention Evangelion. (Source: I was there.) We've got nothing, folks.

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Sat Jul 04, 2015 6:49 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: They didn't even mention Evangelion. (Source: I was there.) We've got nothing, folks.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Sat Jul 04, 2015 2:28 pm Fan- Can you give us release date or a update Eva 3.33 status. Funimation- No but we can tell you that we will be releasing DBZ for the 304th time and now it is remastered on VHS.

[]:             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Sat Jul 04, 2015 6:52 pm EvangelionGodMode wrote: Fan- Can you give us release date or a update Eva 3.33 status. Funimation- No but we can tell you that we will be releasing DBZ for the 304th time and now it is remastered on VHS.
summary:
[]: Funimation Anime Expo Panel at 5 PM...             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 03, 2015 12:38 pm http://www.ustream.tv/channel/animecon-industry If there's no Eva 3.33 announced, we riot.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Jul 03, 2015 12:46 pm Wish I could go. I'm attending a different panel; but rest assured, something that big will be film
